title: pericalymma crassipes
intro: Pericalymma crassipes, also known as the coastal pericalymma or rough-leaved pericalymma, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and fever. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Pericalymma crassipes can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
